speaker: rep
text: Hi, this is Sarah from PhoneBurner. Is this Mike?

speaker: rep
text: Great! I'm calling because we noticed your company recently posted several SDR positions. We help sales teams dial faster and have more conversations. Do you have a couple minutes?

speaker: prospect
text: Sure, but can you hold on one sec? I need to grab something.

speaker: prospect
text: Okay I'm back, sorry about that. Go ahead.

speaker: rep
text: No problem! So the quick version is — PhoneBurner lets your reps make up to 80 calls per hour with zero connection delay. We do local presence dialing so your pickup rates go way up. Most teams see a 3 to 4x increase in live conversations.

speaker: prospect
text: That's interesting. We're currently using a basic auto-dialer but the connection quality isn't great.

speaker: rep
text: Yeah, that's really common. The difference with us is we're not a VoIP dialer — we use carrier-grade connections. Your reps sound like they're calling from a regular phone. Would it be helpful if I set up a demo with your sales manager?

speaker: prospect
text: Yeah, let me check with my team and get back to you. Can you send me some info?

speaker: rep
text: Absolutely. I'll send over a case study and a link to book a demo. What's the best email?

speaker: rep
text: Got it. Thanks Mike, talk soon.
